title: arenaria lanuginosa subsp. saxosa
intro: Arenaria lanuginosa subsp. saxosa, also known as the woolly sandwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Arenaria lanuginosa subsp. saxosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
